response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (0.29) is below my minimum sharing threshold (0.4), and my conservative policy requires me to maintain buffer reserves for the next 9 hours of critical load; I cannot spare 0.5 kWh without jeopardizing my own stability.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.4, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: My battery is too small to sustain both my load and neighborhood sharing; r4c0 is in critical distress and should receive priority if I can spare energy above 40% SoC, but I must hoard aggressively to survive the remaining 9 hours..
